revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Ishizu-jinja]][[ja:石津神社]] {{Expand Japanese|石津神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Ishizu Shrine | native_name = 石津神社 | image = Ishizu-jinja haiden.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Ishizu Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.55438888888889|135.46225}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Kotoshironushi|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|en|Kotoshironushi|fa|کوتوشیرونوشی|fr|Kotoshironushi|ja|事代主|ko|고토시로누시|ru|Котосиронуси|simple|Kotoshironushi|th|โคโตชิโรนูชิ|zh|事代主神|qid=Q8009611|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} | website = {{Official website|http://ishidu-jinja.main.jp/}} }} {{nihongo|'''Ishizu Shrine'''|石津神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izumi Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q11261031|ltq=Q11261031|qid=Q11261031|1=Ebisu Shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Q135100459|ltq=Q135100459|qid=Q135100459|1=Shikinai Subshrine}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11417778|ltq=Q11417778|qid=Q11417778|1=List of Shikinaisha in Izumi Province}} ** Series ordinal: 8 ** P155: {{ill|Kaden Shrine|lt=Kaden Shrine|qid=Q135039161|1=Kaden Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q55532347|ltq=Q55532347|qid=Q55532347|1=Tonoki Shrine}} * {{ill|Q55532347|ltq=Q55532347|qid=Q55532347|1=Tonoki Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Sakai|lt=Sakai|ar|ساكاي|arz|ساكاى (تجمع سكان فى محافظه اوساكا)|ban|Sakai, Osaka|be|Сакаі (Осака)|bg|Сакаи|br|Sakai|ca|Sakai (Osaka)|ceb|Sakai Shi|ce|Сакаи (Осака)|cs|Sakai (Ósaka)|cy|Sakai|da|Sakai|de|Sakai|en|Sakai|envoyage|Sakai (Osaka)|eo|Sakaj|es|Sakai (Osaka)|et|Sakai|eu|Sakai (Osaka)|fa|ساکای، اوساکا|fi|Sakai|fr|Sakai|ga|Sakai|gl|Sakai, Osaka|he|סאקאי|hu|Szakai (Oszaka)|hy|Սակաի|id|Sakai, Osaka|it|Sakai (Osaka)|ja|堺市|javoyage|堺市|ki|Sakai|ko|사카이시 (오사카부)|la|Sacaium|lt|Sakajus|mg|Sakai|mn|Сакай|ms|Sakai|nl|Sakai (Osaka)|no|Sakai|os|Сакаи (Осакæ)|pl|Sakai (Osaka)|plvoyage|Sakai|pt|Sakai (Osaka)|ro|Sakai, Osaka|ru|Сакаи (Осака)|sah|Сакаи|sco|Sakai|sh|Sakai, Osaka|simple|Sakai, Osaka|sk|Sakai (Osaka)|sr|Сакај|su|Sakai, Osaka|sv|Sakai|tg|Сакаи|th|ซาไก (เมือง)|tl|Sakai, Osaka|tr|Sakai|tt|Сакаи (Осака)|tum|Sakai|uk|Сакай (Осака)|ur|ساکائی، اوساکا|uz|Sakai|vi|Sakai|war|Sakai|wuu|堺市|zh_classical|堺市|zh_min_nan|Sakai-chhī (Tāi-pán)|zh_yue|堺市|zh|堺市|zhvoyage|堺市|qid=Q193428|1=Sakai}} * {{ill|Q1047117|ltq=Q1047117|qid=Q1047117|1=Izumi Province}} * {{ill|Ōtori district|lt=Ōtori district|ja|大鳥郡|zh|大鳥郡|qid=Q3270651|1=Ōtori district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.55438888888889|135.46225}} == official website (P856) == * http://ishidu-jinja.main.jp/ ** Language of work: {{ill|Q5287|ltq=Q5287|qid=Q5287|1=Japanese language}} == image (P18) == * Ishizu-jinja haiden.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Q8009611|ltq=Q8009611|qid=Q8009611|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 180975 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * イハツタノ-Engishiki Jinmyōchō * イハツオホ-Engishiki Jinmyōchō * いしづじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 5120105000696 == Commons category (P373) == * Ishizu-jinja == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Ihatsutano- Shrine|lt=Ihatsutano- Shrine|qid=Q135039162|1=Ihatsutano- Shrine}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '大阪府堺市堺区石津町1丁15-21', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '大阪府堺市西区浜寺石津町中', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Ishizu-jinja}} [[JA:石津神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11586788}} == Japanese content == {{Shinto shrine |Name=Ishizu Shrine |Image=[[Image:Ishizu-jinja haiden.jpg|270px]]
Haiden (worship hall) |Location={{ill|lt=Osaka Prefecture|Q122723|qid=Q122723|1=Osaka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Sakai City|Q193428|qid=Q193428|1=Sakai}}{{ill|lt=Sakai Ward|Q1042008|qid=Q1042008|1=Sakai-ku, Sakai}} 1-chōme 15-21 Ishizu-chō |Coordinates={{Coord|34|33|15.8|N|135|27|44.1|E|region:JP-27_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Deities={{ill|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|qid=Q8009611|lt=Yae Kotoshironushi-no-Kami|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}}
{{ill|lt=Ōkuninushi|Q276944|qid=Q276944|lt=Ōnamuchi-no-Kami|1=Ōkuninushi}}
{{ill|qid=Q10940685|lt=Ame-no-Hohi|Q10940685|qid=Q10940685|qid=Q10940685|lt=Ame-no-Hohi-no-Kami|1=Ame no Hohi}} |Shrine rank={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (minor) |Founded=Traditionally: August 10, 7th year of {{ill|lt=Emperor Kōshō|Q312841|qid=Q312841|1=Emperor Kōshō}} ({{ill|lt=469 BC|Q81190|qid=Q81190|1=469 BC}}) |Main hall style={{ill|lt=Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|qid=Q3193781|1=Kasuga-zukuri}} |Annual festival=October 4–5 |Map= {{Location map|Japan Osaka|label=Ishizu Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ishizu Shrine''' (いしづじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Ishizu-chō, {{ill|lt=Sakai Ward|Q1042008|qid=Q1042008|1=Sakai-ku, Sakai}}, {{ill|lt=Sakai City|Q193428|qid=Q193428|1=Sakai}}, {{ill|lt=Osaka Prefecture|Q122723|qid=Q122723|1=Osaka Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} of {{ill|lt=Izumi Province|Q1047117|qid=Q1047117|1=Izumi Province}}. It is also called '''Ishizu Taisha''' and styles itself as “the oldest Ebisu shrine in Japan.” The {{ill|lt=Ebisu|Q1129330|qid=Q1129330|1=Ebisu (mythology)}} deity is generally said to be hard of hearing, and at Ishizu Shrine a board is set up beside the main hall which worshippers strike with a wooden mallet while voicing their wishes. During the season of the Great Purification (Ōharae), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=chinowa|1=UNKNOWN}} (reed ring) is installed. === History === According to shrine tradition, {{ill|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|qid=Q8009611|lt=Yae Kotoshironushi-no-Kami|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} descended to this place carrying five-colored stones, from which the place-name Ishizu is said to have originated. The shrine is identified with the Shikinaisha Ishizu Ōjinja (Iwatsu no Ōjinja), said to have been founded by imperial prayer on August 10 in the 7th year of {{ill|lt=Emperor Kōshō|Q312841|qid=Q312841|1=Emperor Kōshō}}. Regarding Ishizu Ōjinja, {{ill|lt=Ishizu Ōjinja|Q11586779|qid=Q11586779|1=Iwatsuta Shrine}} (Iwatsuta Jinja) in Hamadera Ishizu-chō Naka, {{ill|lt=Nishi Ward (Sakai City)|Q1042499|qid=Q1042499|lt=Nishi Ward|1=Nishi-ku, Sakai}}, is also considered a candidate shrine; it is thought that originally one was the main shrine and the other a {{ill|lt=otabisho|Q11489117|qid=Q11489117|1=Otabisho}} or a branch shrine. Both shrines claim to be “the oldest Ebisu shrine in Japan” as the place where Yae Kotoshironushi-no-Kami (Ebisu deity) descended. The stones carried by Yae Kotoshironushi-no-Kami are said to be buried in front of the shrine, and are believed to rise up out of the ground in times of natural calamities. In addition, the otabisho where Hiruko-no-Mikoto is said to have washed ashore is located on former coastal land on the north bank of the {{ill|lt=Ishizu River|Q11586780|qid=Q11586780|1=Ishizu River}}. It is said that during the reign of {{ill|lt=Emperor Suinin|Q314850|qid=Q314850|1=Emperor Suinin}}, {{ill|lt=Nomi no Sukune|Q965742|qid=Q965742|1=Nomi no Sukune}}, a descendant of {{ill|qid=Q10940685|lt=Ame-no-Hohi|Q10940685|qid=Q10940685|qid=Q10940685|lt=Ame-no-Hohi-no-Kami|1=Ame no Hohi}}, became the shrine’s priest. From {{ill|lt=Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|Q313745|qid=Q313745|1=Tokugawa Tsunayoshi}}, {{ill|lt=Shōgun|Q131767|qid=Q131767|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|lt=Edo shogunate|Q205662|qid=Q205662|1=Tokugawa shogunate}}, the shrine received a shuin land grant in {{ill|lt=Genroku|Q1325001|qid=Q1325001|1=Genroku}} 10 ({{ill|lt=1697|Q7702|qid=Q7702|1=1697}}), and it is said that all of four districts of {{ill|lt=Kawachi Province|Q1047150|qid=Q1047150|lt=Kawachi|1=Kawachi Province}} and the vicinity of Sakai were designated as the shrine’s parishioners. In {{ill|lt=1909|Q2057|qid=Q2057|1=1909}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 42), during the {{ill|lt=shrine consolidation|Q11590700|qid=Q11590700|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy}}, the six-shrine complex of Ōaza Ichi in {{ill|lt=Kamise Village|Q11590694|qid=Q11590694|1=Kamiishi}} was merged into this shrine and enshrined as associated deities. === Enshrined deities === * Principal deities – {{ill|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|qid=Q8009611|lt=Yae Kotoshironushi-no-Kami|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{ill|lt=Ōkuninushi|Q276944|qid=Q276944|lt=Ōnamuchi-no-Kami|1=Ōkuninushi}}, {{ill|qid=Q10940685|lt=Ame-no-Hohi|Q10940685|qid=Q10940685|qid=Q10940685|lt=Ame-no-Hohi-no-Kami|1=Ame no Hohi}} * Associated deities – {{ill|lt=Hachiman|Q261637|qid=Q261637|qid=Q317997|lt=Hondawake-no-Kami|1=Hachiman}}, {{ill|lt=Izanami|Q682306|qid=Q682306|lt=Izanami-no-Kami|1=Izanami}}, {{ill|lt=Kikuri-hime|Q11619891|qid=Q11619891|lt=Shirayama-hime-no-Kami|1=Kikurihime}}, {{ill|lt=Mikumari|Q11129547|qid=Q11129547|1=Mikumari}}, Takano-no-Kami, {{ill|lt=Okami|Q644201|qid=Q644201|lt=Takaokami-no-Kami|1=Kuraokami}} === Shrine grounds === * Main hall * Worship hall * Sarutahiko Shrine – Enshrined deity: {{ill|lt=Sarutahiko|Q3090037|qid=Q3090037|lt=Sarutahiko-no-Kami|1=Sarutahiko Ōkami}} * Shrine office * Portable shrine storehouse * Tenmangū – Enshrined deity: {{ill|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|Q382005|qid=Q382005|1=Sugawara no Michizane}} * Sukune Shrine – Enshrined deities: {{ill|lt=Nomi no Sukune|Q965742|qid=Q965742|1=Nomi no Sukune}}, Ishizu-ō-no-Mikoto * Camphor Shrine * Three {{ill|lt=camphor trees|Q158722|qid=Q158722|1=Camphora officinarum}} – preserved trees of Sakai City * {{ill|lt=Magnolia (Ogata-manoki)|Q11291825|qid=Q11291825|1=Magnolia compressa}} – preserved tree of Sakai City === Shrine crest === Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsu Kashiwa
{{ill|lt=Mitsu Kashiwa|Q65247832|qid=Q65247832|lt=Maru ni Mitsu Kashiwa|1=Maru ni Mitsu Kashiwa}} === Access === * Bus ({{ill|lt=Nankai Bus|Q11408154|qid=Q11408154|1=Nankai Bus}}) ** From {{ill|lt=Sakai-Higashi Station|Q7402783|qid=Q7402783|1=Sakaihigashi Station}}, take the bus bound for {{ill|lt=Ōtori|Q23996403|qid=Q23996403|1=Ōtori}} Nishimachi-minami and get off at Ishizu Shrine-mae. * Railway ** {{ill|lt=Hankai Line|Q5648522|qid=Q5648522|lt=Hankai Line|1=Hankai Line}}: 7-minute walk from {{ill|lt=Ishizu stop|Q11586796|qid=Q11586796|1=Ishizu Station}} ** {{ill|lt=Nankai Main Line|Q59453|qid=Q59453|1=Nankai Main Line}}: 10-minute walk from {{ill|lt=Ishizugawa Station|Q6080457|qid=Q6080457|1=Ishizugawa Station}} === Related items === * {{ill|lt=Ishizu Ōjinja|Q11586779|qid=Q11586779|1=Iwatsuta Shrine}} * {{ill|lt=Futon-daiko|Q11277203|qid=Q11277203|1=Futon Daiko}} * {{ill|lt=Danjiri|Q11271630|qid=Q11271630|1=danjiri}} === External links === * {{Official website|name=Ishizu Shrine}} – Official site * [http://sakai-danjiri.com/ Sakai Danjiri] {{commons|Category:Ishizu-jinja}} {{Shinto}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ishizu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ishizu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ishizu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izumi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sakai, Osaka]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izumi Province]] [[Category:Ebisu shrines]] [[Category:堺市西区の歴史]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Nishi-ku, Sakai]]
